title: polypodium ratiborii
intro: Polypodium ratiborii, also known as Chinese polypodium or Polypodium lepidotum var. ratiborii, is a type of fern species in the family Polypodiaceae. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Polypodium ratiborii include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, Polypodium ratiborii is often used in combination with other herbs to make teas, decoctions, or topical creams, and is traditionally used to treat a range of conditions, including coughs, fever, and skin conditions.
